note: Mirrors the standard grading.json shape (field names text/passed/evidence are load-bearing, the standard HTML viewer depends on them). Wrapping fields (created, last_evaluated, version_at_eval, trigger_precision, trigger_recall) sit at the top level; the inner grading object preserves the upstream grading shape verbatim.

expectations.text: <assertion description, e.g. 'Output is a valid markdown file'>
